# Deployment Trigger

CI + Deploy pipeline triggered: 2026-06-16T23:41:00Z

This file exists solely to trigger the GitHub Actions CI → Deploy pipeline
after all secrets (QF_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, QF_API_KEY, QF_APP_ID,
CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID) have been configured.

Once the Worker is live, this file has no runtime effect.
